briefs.title: Council to Consider: Maple Ridge Special Meeting Agenda Approval — April 14, 2026
briefs.summary: Maple Ridge Council is set to vote on approving the agenda for a Special Council Meeting scheduled for April 14, 2026. The agenda itself has not been made public in this notice, so the specific items up for discussion are not yet known — but approving the agenda is the first step before any formal decisions can be made at that meeting.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the full agenda release to see if any items affect your business.

key_dates.label: Maple Ridge Special Council Meeting — agenda approval and proceedings

briefs.title: Council to Consider Excluding Public from Part of Maple Ridge Meeting
briefs.summary: Maple Ridge Council is set to vote on a resolution to exclude the public from a portion of its April 14, 2026 meeting. This means certain agenda items would be discussed behind closed doors, without members of the public present. The specific topics to be discussed in private have not been detailed in the agenda.
briefs.action_required: Check the Maple Ridge Council agenda for details on what will be discussed in the closed session.

key_dates.label: Maple Ridge Council meeting — public exclusion resolution considered
